name: Andrew Nixdorf
role: AI Quality Engineering • SDET • Edge AI
summary: I make AI systems trustworthy. As a Lead SDET, I design quality frameworks for LLM-powered applications — from model evaluation and output validation to edge AI deployment testing on NVIDIA Jetson. I enable engineering teams to adopt AI tools effectively, champion best practices for agentic workflows, and organize the /dev/reno developer community in Reno, NV.

projects.title: OpenClaw Jetson
projects.description: Production-grade LLM testing environment on NVIDIA Jetson. Containerized Ollama deployment with secure tunnel ingress for remote model evaluation and edge AI quality validation.

projects.title: Jetson AI App
projects.description: Real-time computer vision testing pipeline on NVIDIA Jetson. CSI camera integration with automated validation for model accuracy, latency benchmarking, and edge inference quality.

projects.title: Yahboom Orin Case
projects.description: Hardware monitoring toolkit for Jetson AI workloads — real-time thermal, power, and performance telemetry via I2C sensors during model inference testing.

projects.title: /dev/reno
projects.description: Static site for the /dev/reno developer community — monthly lightning talks and networking in Reno, NV.

experience.title: Lead SDET
highlights: Designing AI quality frameworks for LLM-powered features — prompt evaluation, output validation, and model regression testing
Enabling engineering teams to adopt AI tools effectively — training on agentic workflows, Claude Code best practices, and AI-assisted development
Prototyping edge-AI testing workflows on NVIDIA Jetson for on-device model evaluation and inference quality validation
Architected CI/CD pipelines and Docker-based testing environments on AWS with Playwright and Terraform
Leading QA transformation initiatives and mentoring junior SDETs across multiple product teams

experience.title: Lead Organizer
highlights: Organize monthly tech lightning talks with focus on AI testing, edge AI, and developer tooling
Coordinate developer community in Reno, NV and promote networking events
Manage speaker outreach and build relationships with NVIDIA, AI/ML practitioners, and testing community
Hosted workshops on AI adoption, agentic workflows, and modern testing practices

experience.title: Senior Software Testing Engineer
highlights: Specialized in automation and performance testing frameworks across web, mobile, and API platforms
Developed testing infrastructure and CI/CD pipeline integrations for continuous quality delivery
Built comprehensive QA automation frameworks using Selenium, Playwright, and custom tooling
Led testing initiatives for various technical products and services

meta.title: Andrew Nixdorf — AI/LLM Testing Expert | SDET • Edge AI • Model Validation
meta.description: AI quality engineer specializing in LLM testing, model evaluation, and edge AI validation. Building AI test frameworks on NVIDIA Jetson and Ollama. /dev/reno community lead.
